channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: US Banks Asked to Identify Potential Iranian Money Laundering
item.description: The Treasury Department has requested that U.S. banks monitor for suspected Iranian money laundering activity involving financial institutions.

item.title: Rasmussen: Voters Concerned About Election Security
item.description: A recent survey indicates a majority of likely U.S. voters prioritize preventing election fraud and express concerns about electronic voting systems.

item.title: FBI crime data analysis reveals potential omissions.
Pentagon releases UFO files detailing near-miss incident
item.description: U.S. intelligence officials documented an encounter with unidentified objects exhibiting extreme heat near a military facility.
